mapper.delete: delete from shoppingcart where UID=#{UID} and GID=#{marketGoods.GID}
mapper.select: select shoppingcart.GID, marketgoods.Name, marketgoods.Kind, marketgoods.Price, shoppingcart.Number as CartQuantity, marketgoods.Number as Stock, marketgoods.Image, marketgoods.Status, salegoods.UID as SellerUid, user.Uname as SellerName from shoppingcart join marketgoods on shoppingcart.GID = marketgoods.GID left join salegoods on salegoods.GID = marketgoods.GID left join user on user.UID = salegoods.UID where shoppingcart.UID = #{UID} and shoppingcart.Number > 0
